examples.text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَسَالَتْ أَوْدِيَةٌ بِقَدَرِهَا فَاحْتَمَلَ السَّيْلُ زَبَدًا رَّابِيًا […]
examples.english: He has sent down water from the sky so the valleys flow, [each valley] according to its measure, so then the torrent bears a rising foam […]

senses.gloss: to engage in fellowship with, to try or strive to be friends with
to be with affection for, to love

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of وَدَى (wadā, “to whip out for discharge”).
